Company: The name of the company that is setting the sales uplift target.
Product_Category: The product categories that are affected by tariffs and are the focus of the promotional campaigns.
Campaign_Type: The type of promotional campaigns being run, such as discounts, loyalty bonuses, etc.
Start_Quarter: The start of the period for which the sales uplift target is set.
End_Quarter: The end of the period for which the sales uplift target is set.
Uplift_Target_Percentage: The percentage of sales uplift that is being targeted from the promotional campaigns on the tariff-affected product categories.
